obligations.rule: Ensure domains with numeric TLDs are rejected when allow_numeric_tld is false.
obligations.why: The branch rejecting numeric TLDs when allow_numeric_tld is false is not fully covered.

obligations.rule: Ensure domains with underscores are rejected when allow_underscores is false.
obligations.why: The branch rejecting underscores in domain parts when allow_underscores is false is not fully covered.

obligations.rule: Ensure domains exceeding 63 characters in a part are rejected when ignore_max_length is false.
obligations.why: The branch rejecting overly long domain parts when ignore_max_length is false is not fully covered.

test_groups.title: Numeric TLD rejection when allow_numeric_tld is false
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of numeric TLDs when allow_numeric_tld is false.

test_groups.title: Underscore rejection when allow_underscores is false
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of underscores in domain parts when allow_underscores is false.

test_groups.title: Domain part length rejection when ignore_max_length is false
test_groups.rationale: Tests rejection of domain parts exceeding 63 characters when ignore_max_length is false.
